description: Initial screen showing instructions to share the window for the user testing session.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text providing instructions on how to start the session by sharing the window. A small video overlay of the participant is in the top right corner.

description: Task instructions are revealed on the screen.
frame_description: The text on the dark screen updates to describe a travel planning task from Sunshine Coast to London.

description: An 'Open' button appears to proceed to the task.
frame_description: A circular button with an 'Open' icon and label appears at the bottom center of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The 'Open' button is clicked, and the screen begins to transition.

description: New instructions appear reminding the user to think aloud.
frame_description: Dark screen with text: 'Please remember to think aloud as you work through the task, and let me know when you feel you've completed it.'

description: User clicks the second 'Open' button to start the task.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Open' button in the center of the screen.

description: The browser loads the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dark instruction page to the white Google search page.

description: Cursor hovers over the Google search input field.
frame_description: The Google homepage is visible with the cursor positioned over the main search bar.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Google Search' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Google Search' button below the search bar.

description: Task scenario text begins appearing on the instruction screen: 'I can. Imagine you're living on the Sunshine Coast in Queensland and you're planning'
frame_description: A dark screen with the prompt 'What are you thinking right now?' and task instructions being typed out automatically.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'I'm Feeling Lucky' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'I'm Feeling Lucky' button.

description: Cursor hovers over the search input field again.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the main search bar on the Google homepage.

description: Navigation to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The Google homepage is displayed with a search bar in the center.

description: User types 'skyscanner' into the Google search box.
frame_description: The user is typing in the Google search bar, and the text 'skyscanner' is visible.

description: Google search autocomplete suggestions appear and update as the user types.
frame_description: A dropdown list of search suggestions is visible below the Google search bar.

description: User clicks the search icon to execute the query.
frame_description: The cursor is over the search icon in the Google search bar at the moment of the click.

description: Navigation to the Google search results page for 'skyscanner'.
frame_description: The Google search results page is displayed, showing various links for Skyscanner.

description: User hovers over the first search result: 'Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast'.
interaction_target: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue title link of the first search result.

description: User clicks on the Skyscanner website link in the search results.
interaction_target: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: The Skyscanner link is highlighted as the user clicks it.

description: Navigation to the Skyscanner homepage.
page_title: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: The screen transitions from Google results to a loading state and then eventually to the Skyscanner homepage.

description: Skyscanner loading screen with logo appears.
frame_description: A dark blue screen with a white Skyscanner logo in the center.

description: Task instruction overlay reappears with more text being typed out: 'a holiday to London. Start by telling us what you would consider first when planning a long-haul trip like this. You can approach this however yo'
frame_description: The instruction overlay is visible again, with new text appearing character-by-character.

description: Final part of the task instructions appears: 'normally would. Show us where you start, what you prioritise, and how you move through the planning process... Please think aloud as you go.'
frame_description: The instruction overlay is fully populated with the complete task description.

description: The Skyscanner homepage is fully rendered and the instruction overlay disappears.
page_title: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is visible, showing flight search options and promotional content.

description: User types 'sun' into the 'From' input field.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is visible with the flight search form in focus.

description: A dropdown menu with location suggestions appears below the 'From' field.
frame_description: A list of airport suggestions starting with 'sun' is displayed below the origin input field.

description: User selects 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' from the autocomplete suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on the first suggestion in the dropdown menu.

description: A system overlay message 'Yes, please think aloud as you go...' appears.
frame_description: A dark overlay with white text appears over the Skyscanner homepage.

description: The system overlay message disappears.
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is fully visible again.

description: User types 'lond' into the 'To' input field.
frame_description: The user is interacting with the destination input field in the search form.

description: A dropdown menu with location suggestions appears below the 'To' field.
frame_description: A list of airport suggestions for 'London' is displayed below the destination input field.

description: User selects 'London (Any)' from the autocomplete suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'London (Any)' option in the dropdown.

description: User clicks the 'Search' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue Search button as it is clicked.

description: Navigation from the homepage to the flight search results page.
frame_description: The browser transitions from the homepage to the results view.

description: A loading spinner appears while the search is processed.
frame_description: A white screen with a blue loading spinner in the center.

description: Search results page loads with skeleton screens.
frame_description: The results page layout is visible with grey placeholder boxes where flight details will appear.

description: User clicks the 'Select' button on the first flight result.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the Select button of the top flight result.

description: The flight result card expands to show booking options.
frame_description: The selected flight card is now larger, showing multiple 'Book' buttons for different travel providers.

description: Hovering over the 'Select' button for the first flight result.
frame_description: Skyscanner search results page showing flight options from Sunshine Coast to London.

description: Clicking the '2+ stops' filter checkbox in the sidebar.
frame_description: Skyscanner search results with filter options visible in the left sidebar.

description: A 'Searching...' loading overlay appears while the filter is applied.
frame_description: Skyscanner results page with a 'Searching...' loading overlay in the center.

description: Search results update to show no flights found and display London hotel deals.
frame_description: Skyscanner page showing the message 'Sorry, there aren't any flights that match your filters.' and hotel listings.

description: Unchecking the '2+ stops' filter checkbox.
frame_description: Skyscanner page with no flight results and the filter sidebar.

description: Flight search results are restored after removing the filter.
frame_description: Skyscanner search results page with flight options visible again.

description: Scrolling down the filters sidebar.
frame_description: Skyscanner search results page with the sidebar scrolling.

description: Scrolling down the flight results list.
frame_description: Skyscanner search results page with the main content area scrolling.

description: Navigating away from Skyscanner to a new tab page.
frame_description: Transition from Skyscanner to a blank white screen, then the Google search page.

description: Navigating to Trello.
frame_description: Google New Tab page, then transition to the Trello dashboard loading.

description: Trello dashboard content and cookie consent banner appear.
frame_description: Trello home page with boards visible and a cookie banner at the top.

description: Clicking 'Accept all' on the Trello cookie consent banner.
frame_description: Trello dashboard with the cookie banner active.

description: Clicking on the 'Japan' board card.
frame_description: Trello dashboard showing various boards.

description: Navigating to the 'Japan' Trello board.
frame_description: Transition from the Trello dashboard to the board view.

description: Lists and cards on the Japan board load.
frame_description: Trello board view with lists like 'Tokyo To Do', 'Tokyo Food', and 'Sapporo To Do'.

description: Horizontal scrolling to the right on the Trello board.
frame_description: Trello board view moving right to reveal more lists.

description: Horizontal scrolling back to the left on the Trello board.
frame_description: Trello board view moving left.

description: Hovering over the 'Lake Toyako' card.
frame_description: Trello board view showing the 'Niseko To Do' list.

description: User navigates from the Trello board to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The Trello board 'Japan' is replaced by a white loading screen, then the Google search page appears.

description: Navigating away from Trello to a new tab page.
frame_description: Transition from Trello to the Google search page.

description: Navigating to Booking.com.
frame_description: Google New Tab page, then transition to the Booking.com homepage.

description: User navigates to the Booking.com homepage.
frame_description: The Google homepage is replaced by a white screen, then the Booking.com homepage loads.

description: A 'Genius' sign-in modal appears on the Booking.com homepage.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations
frame_description: A blue and white modal with the text 'Sign in, save money' appears in the center of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'X' button to close the sign-in modal.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the close button of the modal and a click is performed.

description: The sign-in modal closes.
frame_description: The modal vanishes, showing the Booking.com search bar and background image.

description: User clicks into the destination search field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the text 'Cradle Mountain' in the destination input field.

description: User types 'lon' into the destination search field.
frame_description: The characters 'l', 'o', and 'n' appear in the destination input field.

description: Autocomplete suggestions appear for the destination search.
frame_description: A dropdown list appears showing suggestions like 'London' and 'London, Greater London, United Kingdom'.

description: User selects 'London, Greater London, United Kingdom' from the suggestions.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the first item in the suggestion dropdown.

description: User clicks the 'Search' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the large blue 'Search' button on the right side of the search bar.

description: The page navigates to the search results for London.
frame_description: The homepage is replaced by a loading state, then the search results page for London appears.

description: User scrolls down through the search results.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: User scrolls up slightly.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards slightly.

description: User hovers over the 'Sign in' button in the header.
frame_description: The cursor rests on the 'Sign in' button at the top right of the page.

description: User hovers over the 'Deluxe Two-Bedroom Vauxhall Apartment' listing.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the title of the first hotel result.

description: The screen changes to the participant task instruction prompt.
frame_description: The Booking.com page is replaced by a dark screen with the text 'What are you thinking about doing next?' and a participant webcam view.
